mission.title: prometheus: Support reload config automatically
mission.description:
Introduces automatic reloading of the Prometheus configuration file at a specified interval.

  - `--config.auto-reload-interval`: Interval to check for config changes (default: `30s`).
  - `--enable-feature=auto-reload-config`: Enables the auto-reload functionality.

Uses checksum-based detection to identify config changes and trigger reloads.
Avoids platform-specific file watching `inotify`, ensuring cross-platform and file storage compatibility. Removes the need for throttling.

Fixes #9783

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
